---
name: ✨ Feature / new roast
about: Suggest a new stat, roast, or feature
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the idea?

Describe the feature or the roast you have in mind.

## Why?

What would it add to the recap? Which git behavior does it expose?

## Sketch (optional)

Mock the line, the burn, or the chart you're picturing.
